description_long: This object is a rustic beer mug constructed from vertically aligned wooden staves, each displaying a natural wood grain pattern. The mug is reinforced by two black metal bands, one near the top and one near the bottom, which are fastened with visible rivets. A large, curved metal handle is attached to one side, providing a sturdy grip and adding to the medieval or tavern-like aesthetic. The top of the mug is open, revealing the hollow interior suitable for holding liquid. The wood appears slightly worn, giving the mug a well-used, authentic look. There are no visible labels, logos, or decorative graphics on the exterior.
description: A rustic wooden beer mug with black metal bands and a large curved handle, featuring visible wood grain and an open top.
description_view_0: The mug is shown with its curved metal handle prominently on the right, displaying the wood grain and metal bands clearly.
description_view_1: The mug is viewed directly from the back, with the handle centered and extending outward, obscuring part of the wood staves.
description_view_2: The handle is now on the left, and the wood staves and metal bands are fully visible, similar to the front but mirrored.
description_view_3: The mug is shown from the side opposite the handle, revealing only the wooden staves and metal bands with no handle visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The exterior features natural wood grain patterns and black metal bands with rivets, giving it a handcrafted, medieval appearance. There are no labels, text, or decorative graphics present.
